completed_tasks.name: Remove platform binaries from git tracking
Fix test failures (binary check + Settings client mock)

decisions.decision: Settings and OPML account management stay independent
decisions.rationale: Settings = global default, OPML = per-player override. Settings-Switch is authoritative and clears all per-client overrides.

decisions.decision: Credential isolation via reconnect_cache, not per-player cache dirs
decisions.rationale: Spirc::new() always calls store_credentials=true. Stripping credentials_location from reconnect cache is the only reliable prevention.
CI builds all 7 platform binaries at tag-push. 28 binary commits bloated the repo. gitignored Plugins/SpotOn/Bin/

decisions.decision: OPML switch shows confirmation text, no back-link
decisions.rationale: OPML limitation: every url click creates a breadcrumb level. Nested SpotOn link caused stacking. Simple text confirmation is the cleanest UX within OPML constraints.

next_action: No immediate next action. All bugs fixed and released. Check forum and issues for new reports.
context_notes: Productive bugfix session: two releases (v2.1.4, v2.1.5) shipping fixes for multi-account switch (#75) and Connect credential overwrite. Key discovery: spoton.db is a separate cache DB from cache.db — both must be cleared for cache-related debugging.
